test_code:
from target import days_in_month

def test_days_in_month():
    # Typical months with 31 days
    assert days_in_month(2021, 1) == 31
    # Typical months with 30 days
    assert days_in_month(2021, 4) == 30
    # February in a leap year divisible by 400
    assert days_in_month(2000, 2) == 29
    # February in a common year (non‑leap)
    assert days_in_month(1900, 2) == 28
    # February in a typical leap year divisible by 4 but not 100
    assert days_in_month(2024, 2) == 29
    # Edge case: month number out of typical range (function still returns based on year logic)
    assert days_in_month(2021, 13) == 28)
